name: PAR30 LED Bulb – 11 Watts –  850 Lumens – Energy Star and UL listed.
description: Features: Dimmable : Features seamless dimming (10%-100%) to suit various moods and decor, ideal for bedrooms, kitchens, living areas, and offices. Waterproof : IP65 wet-rated, ensuring durability in wet environments, making it perfect for outdoor spaces like gardens, patios, decks, and yards. Beam Angle : Narrow 40° beam angle, ideal for spotlighting architectural elements, art, and decor both inside and outdoors. Energy Efficient : Reduces energy consumption by up to 85% compared to traditional bulbs, offering long-lasting performance and cost savings on relamping. Certified and Safe : UL listed and backed by Energy Star, FCC, and RoHS certifications, ensuring optimal performance, safety, and environmental friendliness.
short_desc: PAR30 LED Bulb, 11 Watts, 2200K/2700K/3000K/4000K/5000K/6000K, 850 Lumens, Energy Star and UL listed. Specifications: Lumen Output: 850 lm Efficacy: 77 lm/W Wattage: 11W Wattage Equivalent: 75W Input Voltage: 120V Operating Temperature: 4°F – 104°F Dimmable: Yes Color Temperature Options: 2200K / 2700K / 3000K / 4000K / 5000K / 6000K CRI: 80+ Beam Angle: 40° IP Rating: IP65 Moisture Rating: Wet Rated Bulb Base: E26 Finish: Frosted Material: Aluminum, Polycarbonate Certifications: Energy Star, UL, FCC, RoHS Switching Cycles: 30,000 Lifetime: 25,000 Hours Warranty: 5 Years
